steps.title: Identify what the passage fundamentally does
steps.content: The passage walks through Raccoon Mountain's operational cycle: water pumped upward during low demand (storing energy), water released downward during peak demand (generating power). This sequential explanation of how the technology operates is the passage's defining feature.

steps.title: Match the operation to the choices
steps.content: Choice B states the passage explains how a specific technology works—exactly what it does. Choices A, C, and D either describe elements absent from the text (comparing methods, encouraging construction) or reverse the main-versus-supporting hierarchy (benefits over mechanism). That matches choice B — B is correct.
